# AI-smell faux-specific vagueness phrases — single source of truth.
# Checked across the whole document. Fires when phrases appear WITHOUT a
# specific number. "Several" is vague; "three" is concrete.
# Consumed by tests/hooks/artifact-discipline.bats _check_faux_vague.
# Referenced by rules/common/output-discipline-voice.md (row 11).
#
# Pruned 2026-04-26 — kept well-attested phrases that have caught real
# regressions; dropped speculative variants ("a variety of", "a range of
# different", "numerous factors", "various aspects") that fire on
# legitimate use as often as on smell.
several key insights
several important
a number of
multiple important
